info.title: LinkedIn Community Management
info.description: LinkedIn Community Management connector covering Posts, Comments, Reactions, Organizations, Social Metadata, Media Uploads (Images, Videos, Documents), and Organization Analytics (Share, Page, Follower Statistics). MCP-enabled for Copilot Studio integration. Uses LinkedIn Marketing API v202602.

post.description: Creates a new post on LinkedIn. Supports text, image, video, article, document, poll, multi-image, and reshare content types.

author.description: URN of the author (e.g., urn:li:organization:123 or urn:li:person:456)

commentary.description: Text content of the post. Supports @mentions via {urn} syntax.

visibility.description: Post visibility: PUBLIC, CONNECTIONS, or LOGGED_IN

content.description: Rich content attachment (image, video, article, document, poll, multi-image)

media.description: Single media attachment (image, video, or document)

id.description: Media URN (image, video, or document URN)

duration.description: Poll duration: ONE_DAY, THREE_DAYS, ONE_WEEK, TWO_WEEKS

reshareContext.description: Reshare context for resharing an existing post

parent.description: URN of the post to reshare

get.description: Retrieves posts authored by a specific member or organization.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of posts to return (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of the first post to return for pagination

get.description: Retrieves a single post by its URN.

post.description: Partially updates an existing post. Can update commentary, distribution, and content properties.

delete.description: Deletes a post by its URN.

get.description: Retrieves comments on a post or other social entity.

parameters.name: entityUrn
parameters.description: Entity URN to get comments for (e.g., urn:li:ugcPost:12345)

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of first comment to return

post.description: Creates a comment on a post or other social entity.

parameters.name: entityUrn
parameters.description: Entity URN to comment on (e.g., urn:li:ugcPost:12345)

parentComment.description: Parent comment URN for threaded replies (optional)

get.description: Retrieves a specific comment by its ID.

parameters.name: entityUrn
parameters.description: Entity URN the comment belongs to

delete.description: Deletes a comment from a post.

parameters.name: entityUrn
parameters.description: Entity URN the comment belongs to

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: Actor URN performing the delete (e.g., urn:li:organization:123)

get.description: Retrieves reactions on a post or other social entity.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Entity URN to get reactions for (e.g., urn:li:ugcPost:12345)

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of first reaction to return

reactionType.description: Reaction type: LIKE, PRAISE, EMPATHY, INTEREST, APPRECIATION, ENTERTAINMENT, MAYBE

post.description: Creates a reaction on a post or other social entity.

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: Actor URN creating the reaction (e.g., urn:li:person:123 or urn:li:organization:456)

root.description: Entity URN to react to (e.g., urn:li:ugcPost:12345)

delete.description: Removes a reaction from a post. The actor and entity URNs form the compound key for the reaction to delete.

parameters.name: entityUrn
parameters.description: Entity URN the reaction is on (e.g., urn:li:ugcPost:12345)

get.description: Retrieves an organization by its numeric ID.
Looks up an organization by its vanity name (URL slug).
Retrieves the total follower count for an organization.
Retrieves organization access control entries for the authenticated member or a specific organization.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query type: roleAssignee (for current member) or organization (for org admins)

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter by role: ADMINISTRATOR, DIRECT_SPONSORED_CONTENT_POSTER, etc.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state: APPROVED or REQUESTED

get.description: Retrieves social metadata (like counts, comment counts, share counts) for a post or entity.

post.description: Enables or disables comments on a post.

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: Actor URN performing the toggle (e.g., urn:li:organization:123)

commentsDisabled.description: Set to true to disable comments, false to enable

post.description: Initializes an image upload and returns an upload URL. After receiving the URL, PUT your binary image data to it.

uploadUrl.description: URL to PUT image binary data to

image.description: Image URN to reference in posts

get.description: Retrieves image details by its URN.

post.description: Initializes a video upload and returns upload instructions with URLs for each chunk. Videos are uploaded in 4MB chunks.

uploadUrl.description: URL to PUT chunk data to

post.description: Finalizes a video upload after all chunks have been uploaded. Requires the video URN, upload token, and ETags from each chunk upload.

uploadedPartIds.description: Array of ETags from each chunk upload response

get.description: Retrieves video details by its URN.

post.description: Initializes a document upload and returns an upload URL. Supports PPT, PPTX, DOC, DOCX, and PDF up to 100MB.

uploadUrl.description: URL to PUT document binary data to

document.description: Document URN to reference in posts

get.description: Retrieves document details by its URN.
Retrieves share (post) statistics for an organization. Includes impressions, clicks, comments, likes, shares, and engagement metrics. Data available for the past 12 months.

parameters.name: timeIntervals
parameters.description: Time interval in RESTli format: (timeRange:(start:{epochMs},end:{epochMs}),timeGranularityType:DAY). Omit for lifetime stats.

timeRange.description: Time range for this data point

get.description: Retrieves page view statistics for an organization page, segmented by geography, industry, function, seniority, and staff count range.

parameters.name: timeIntervals
parameters.description: Time interval in RESTli format. Omit for lifetime stats.

views.description: View counts by page and device

get.description: Retrieves follower demographics and growth statistics for an organization. Lifetime stats include 7 facets (geo, function, industry, seniority, etc.). Time-bound stats show follower gains.

parameters.name: timeIntervals
parameters.description: Time interval in RESTli format (granularity: DAY, WEEK, or MONTH). Omit for lifetime demographics.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration. Provides AI agents access to LinkedIn Community Management operations as tools.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete LinkedIn posts

tags.name: Reactions
tags.description: Manage reactions on posts and comments

tags.name: Social Metadata
tags.description: Social engagement metadata and comment toggling

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Image, video, and document upload management

scopes.w_member_social: Post, comment, and react on behalf of a member
scopes.w_organization_social: Post, comment, and react on behalf of an organization
scopes.r_organization_social: Retrieve organization posts, comments, and reactions
scopes.rw_organization_admin: Manage organization pages and retrieve analytics
